title: Osteoarthritis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Osteoarthritis is a common joint condition that can cause pain and stiffness.
Supportive care may include activity changes, exercise, weight management, and clinician-directed pain control.
Acute trauma, fever, red hot joint, severe inability to use the joint, or diagnostic uncertainty require separate evaluation.
